question: What two leisure scenarios were depicted in the video showing people in non-commercial settings, and how does this contrast with the reported decline in Eurozone services PMI and overall demand in June?
answer: People were shown relaxing on a sandy beach and patrons enjoying meals at an outdoor café, contrasting with the reported decline in Eurozone services PMI to 52.6 and the first drop in demand since February.

video: People are relaxing and walking along a sandy beach with a modern building visible in the background.
An outdoor café features patrons seated at tables under umbrellas, enjoying meals and drinks.
text: Demand in the Eurozone fell in June for the first time since February.
The Eurozone services industry PMI declined to 52.6 in June, below analyst forecasts.
